understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete each level by placing every selectable piece onto goal tiles marked with a '+' in the semantic grid, such that all goal tiles are simultaneously occupied by selectables to trigger WIN; progressing through all levels wins the full game within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses MOVE_* actions to shift only the currently selected piece by one 3-pixel cell step (pixel coordinates like [x,y] where x increases right and y down). Walls/boundaries can block movement, and the blocked hints are only advisory (an adjacent object may or may not truly prevent motion). Some objects (blocks) can be pushed if adjacent in the movement direction, causing the block to move with the piece when space allows. Multiple selectable pieces can exist; CLICK with a target_position matching an on-screen selectable’s pixel position is required to switch control, but clicking a non-selectable or an incorrect coordinate has no effect.
